questions.question: Describe the difference between Nearest-Neighbor Learning and Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm. Explain how the later handles the case when multiple nearest neighbors have the same distance from the new data point.
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences and implementation details

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using the Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm over the traditional Nearest-Neighbor Learning approach? Provide a specific example to illustrate your point.
questions.hint: Focus on the key benefit and a relevant example

questions.question: State the mathematical formula for the Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm. Explain the role of each parameter in the equation.
questions.hint: Focus on the mathematical formulation and parameter roles
